On This Page 
Overview National Hospital Reporting Statistics Hospital Inpatient Bed Occupancy 
Hospital Intensive Care Unit (ICU) Bed Occupancy Percent of Hospitals Reporting How to use the NHSN Hospital Respiratory Data (HRD) interactive dashboards 
Overview Beginning November 1, 2024, the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) requires acute care and critical access hospitals to report information regarding COVID-19, influenza, and RSV hospitalizations, bed capacity, and occupancy to CDC’s NHSN. These data provide ongoing situational awareness and insight into current patient health and safety needs
